title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 06 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures continued to hit botiom today, with the most-traded contract I2605 closing at 760.5yuan/mt, down 1.23% from the previous trading day. Spot prices fell by 5-10 yuan/mt compared to the previous trading day. The decline in futures and the approaching weekend dampened traders' willingness to offer prices, while most steel mills maintained a wait-and-see stance.
